content.query:
DROP VIEW [EDW].[vw_RECON_ACU_RDC]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE VIEW [EDW].[vw_RECON_ACU_RDC]
AS 
SELECT 
glSumm.[Module]
,glSumm.[PeriodID]
,glSumm.[Branch]
,glSumm.[Account]
,glSumm.[DebitAmount] as ACU_DebitAmount
,glSumm.[CreditAmount] as ACU_CreditAmount
,glSumm.[DebitAmount] - glSumm.[CreditAmount] as ACU_BalanceAmount
,glSumm.[LineCount] as ACU_LineCount
,factGL.RDC_DebitAmount
,factGL.RDC_CreditAmount
,factGL.RDC_BalanceAmount
,factGL.RDC_LineCount
,factGL.RDC_BalanceAmount - (glSumm.[DebitAmount] - glSumm.[CreditAmount]) as Diff_BalanceAmount
,isnull(factGL.RDC_LineCount,0) - glSumm.[LineCount] as Diff_LineCount
 FROM
 [ODS].[ERP_GL_SUMMARY] glSumm left join
 (
    select 
        [Module], 
        FinPeriodID, 
        AccountCode,
        BranchCode,
        sum(CreditAmount) as RDC_CreditAmount, 
        sum(DebitAmount) as RDC_DebitAmount, 
        sum(BalanceAmount) as RDC_BalanceAmount,
        count(1) as RDC_LineCount
    from
        [EDW].[FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION] 
    where
        Posted = 'True'
    group by
        [Module], 
        FinPeriodID,
        AccountCode,
        BranchCode
 ) factGL on
glSumm.[Module] = factGL.[Module]
and glSumm.PeriodID = REPLACE(factGL.FinPeriodID,'-','')
and glSumm.Account = factGL.AccountCode
and glSumm.Branch = factGL.BranchCode
WHERE
 (
    (glSumm.[DebitAmount] - glSumm.[CreditAmount]) != factGL.RDC_BalanceAmount or
     factGL.RDC_LineCount > glSumm.[LineCount]
 ) 
 or
 factGL.RDC_LineCount is null
--order by 
--[Module]
--,[PeriodID]
--,[Branch]
--,Diff_LineCount desc
